summary: The notebook currently holds two notes: a foundations course note on gradient descent and a paper-reading note on the Transformer.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: One course note covers gradient descent fundamentals: the update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: No notes yet on momentum, Adam, second-order methods, or other optimization refinements.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A reading note on Attention Is All You Need covers self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT translation results.
areas.gap: No notes on follow-up architectures, sub-quadratic attention, rotary encodings, or training-scaling recipes.
